definitions: adj. 普遍存在的；广泛流传的（在此语境下指故事非常流行且常见）

examples.text: It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time, and there is a lot of truth to it.
examples.explanation: pervasive 在句中表示“普遍存在的、广泛流传的”，说明这个故事是我们这个时代非常常见、影响广泛的叙事之一。

reviewSessions.example_text: disconnected and powerless in the face of problems too big to solve. And so the state of the world fills many of us with doom, hopelessness and sadness. We feel it too. It is one of the most pervasive stories of our time and there is a lot of truth to it. But as Terry Pratchett said, we are the storytelling ape, we think in narratives and live in a network of stories that make up our world. So without minimising the darkness,
expected_definitions: adj. 普遍存在的；广泛流传的（在此语境下指故事非常流行且常见）
reviewSessions.feedback: 你未作答，未体现出 pervasive 的含义。
missing_points: 在语境中指这种故事非常流行且常见

relations.reason: pervasive 与 ubiquitous 都表示“普遍存在、到处都是”，语义高度接近，且都常用于描述现象、技术或影响广泛存在，适合建立近义跳转。
pervasive 与 prevalent 都可表示“普遍存在的、广泛流行的”，都常用于描述现象、观念、问题等在某范围内很常见，语义接近，适合建立近义词关系。
